title: SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs and the school districts serving them, including IEP support and transition services. 13455 SE 97th Avenue Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Children with special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 675-4260 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 675-4260 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START TO SUCCESS EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL EMPLOYMENT - C-TEC YOUTH SERVICES PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
